description: An editorial-style masonry gallery. Images vary in aspect ratio (4:5, 1:1, 16:9) to create a rhythmic, non-linear flow. Each image is separated by a 48px 'white space' gap that is actually Deep Charcoal. On hover, images subtly scale up by 2% and a Champagne Gold overlay reveals the project name and year in minimalist typography. No borders on images; sharp corners only.
